description: Apache Pekko Streams provides APIs and runtime infrastructure for asynchronous, non-blocking, backpressured stream processing on top of Pekko actors. The pekko-stream_3 artifact is the Scala 3 JVM build of the core Streams module, including Scala and Java DSLs for building Sources, Flows, Sinks, graph stages, stream I/O, and Reactive Streams interop.
